description.value: The creature is nearly impossible to kill permanently. When it is reduced to 0 Wounds, it falls inert for 1d10 rounds, after which it returns with 1d10 Wounds. Only specific methods (such as fire, holy weapons, or destroying a phylactery) can kill it permanently. The specific method is noted in the creature's profile.

system.benefit: When reduced to 0 Wounds, the creature falls inert for 1d10 rounds then returns with 1d10 Wounds. Only specific methods (noted in profile) can permanently destroy it.
